array.string: echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] sync started"; /usr/local/bin/docker info >&/dev/null || { echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] Docker not running — skipping"; exit 0; }; /usr/local/bin/docker exec openclaw-gateway bash /home/node/.openclaw/scripts/daily-sync-container.sh; code=$?; echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] sync finished (exit $code)"; [ $code -ne 0 ] && osascript -e 'display notification "Vérifie /tmp/drobdi-memory-sync.log" with title "drobdi sync failed"'; exit $code
